Actions.Text: REPORTED AND COMMITTED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Relates to artist preferences in housing
Summary: Relates to artist preferences in housing; provides that giving occupancy preference to individuals who are involved in artistic activities is not an unlawful discriminatory practice provided that such preference is implemented or authorized by an agency or the state of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to artist preferences in housing
